### [States](/documentation/Photos/PHAssetResourceUploadJob/State-swift.enum/registered#States)

[`case pending`](/documentation/photos/phassetresourceuploadjob/state-swift.enum/pending)The job has been registered.[`case succeeded`](/documentation/photos/phassetresourceuploadjob/state-swift.enum/succeeded)The job has failed to send over.[`case failed`](/documentation/photos/phassetresourceuploadjob/state-swift.enum/failed)A request has been made to send the asset resource to the destination, but has not yet been fulfilled.
